SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS JENNY VANG AND ORIENT R AU-VANG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIAN S CHIN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANG, JENNY AU-VANG, ORIENT R (SON, LIVE-IN CARE-GIVER, AND REPRESENTATIVE) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIN, MARIAN S MARIAN S. CIN REVOC TR, MARIAN S. CHIN TRUSTEE $2,998.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,123.00, PLAINTIFF HAS MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S MOVING EXPENSES TO ANOTHER STATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
